rootCause: Several quests described constructing or installing physical systems but offered only dialogue/item gates, so players could complete them without running any diegetic build process in real time.
resolution: Added explicit process steps (including new real-time biogas construction/fermentation and wheel-encoder install/calibration processes), updated coupled Skills docs, and added regression tests that fail build/install quests lacking process options while enforcing a low global no-process quest ratio.
